title: Oman announces early release of salaries for public and private sector employees ahead of Eid Al Fitr 2026
summary_full: Oman is ensuring workers can celebrate Eid Al Fitr without financial stress. Government employees will receive March salaries by March 17, 2026, following strict payroll deadlines. Private sector firms are also directed to disburse March wages by March 18, 2026, to help families prepare for the festive occasion.
